Pillar_Narratives.Sovereign Financial Stress: Financial stress remains moderate but is under upward pressure due to "Fed’s Goolsbee warns energy shocks cloud rate outlook," which complicates monetary policy and inflationary control efforts. Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: Currency and liquidity pressures are at a medium level, primarily influenced by the "Fed’s Goolsbee warns energy shocks cloud rate outlook," implying potential interest rate adjustments and market uncertainty.
